google_descriptions: Keep one goal on your Home Screen and Lock Screen. Beautiful themes, fast setup.
Goalz turns a long ambition into a clear daily visual—widgets included.
Designed for people who want one priority goal, not another noisy habit app.
meta_primary_text: If you keep one goal in front of you every day, you actually finish it. Goalz is a countdown + widgets app built for that—no ads, no account.
One goal. Home Screen + Lock Screen widgets. A clean daily countdown so your priority is impossible to ignore.
Trying a 30-day challenge? Goalz keeps the countdown visible so you do not drift after week one.
